questions.title: Clinical Assessment - Trauma
questions.question_text: Describe your approach to assessing a patient presenting with trauma
expected_points: Assess trauma using appropriate assessment tools
Monitor vital signs and observations specific to trauma
Implement evidence-based interventions for trauma
Document findings and care provided
Escalate concerns appropriately in emergency setting

questions.title: Medication Calculation - Paracetamol
questions.question_text: A 70kg patient requires 15mg/kg of paracetamol. Calculate the total dose required.
expected_points: Show all working clearly
Check calculation twice
Consider patient factors
Verify with another healthcare professional if unsure

questions.title: Medication Calculation - Medication
questions.question_text: Calculate the infusion rate for 1000ml of 0.9% sodium chloride to be given over 8 hours.
expected_points: Show all working clearly
Check calculation twice
Consider patient factors
Verify with another healthcare professional if unsure

questions.title: Leadership - Patient Safety Leadership
questions.question_text: Describe your approach to patient safety leadership in emergency. What challenges might you face and how would you address them?
expected_points: Demonstrate understanding of leadership principles
Consider team dynamics and individual needs
Address potential challenges proactively
Show evidence-based approach to management

questions.title: Clinical Supervision
questions.question_text: How would you provide effective clinical supervision to a junior nurse in emergency? What documentation and processes would you follow?
expected_points: Establish clear supervision framework
Regular review and feedback sessions
Document supervision activities
Support professional development
Address any concerns promptly
